name: Aha!
description: Monitor Aha! product roadmap and strategy platform for team access and product planning compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Aha! at https://secure.aha.io
2. Go to Profile → Developer → API Key
3. Note your account subdomain from the URL
4. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Aha! → Profile → Developer → API Key

credentialFields.label: Account Subdomain
credentialFields.helpText: Your Aha! account subdomain (e.g. mycompany from mycompany.aha.io)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Aha! account users and their product roadmap access

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Aha! product management is active and accessible
